creator: pfgshield-freebsd@yahoo.com
text:
Hello;

FWIW, along with the SuiteSparse maintainer we wanted to keep this port for two
reasons:

- SuiteSparse has a restrictive license.
- Some people (and I recall some ports too) prefer to use the slimmer umfpack
and not the bigger package.

best regards,

    Pedro.
